patterns.cli_subcommand: Clap #[derive(Subcommand)] enum in main.rs; each command variant maps to a handler function in its own module
patterns.card_data_contract: CardView struct (render/mod.rs) is the view model — renderers and UI never read filesystem directly; use from_meta(&Meta, state) to convert
patterns.event_loop: list_cards_watch() uses notify-debouncer-mini + tokio::sync::mpsc::unbounded_channel + tokio::select! for async event multiplexing
patterns.filesystem_state_machine: Card state determined by directory: pending/running/done/failed/merged; fs::rename is the atomic transition
patterns.progressive_rendering: CardRenderer trait with 5 levels (Dumb→TrueColor); TermCaps::detect() re-queried every frame
patterns.log_streaming: logs.rs cmd_logs() uses seek-based polling with 200ms sleep; reads bytes, colorizes per-line
patterns.card_collection: list.rs collect_card_views() iterates state_dir entries, filters .bop extension, calls read_meta + from_meta
patterns.provider_reading: providers.rs read_providers() returns ProvidersFile with BTreeMap<String,Provider>; has cooldown_until_epoch_s for rate-limit detection
patterns.singleton_lock: lock.rs acquire_watch_lock() uses mkdir-atomicity pattern for process-level singleton guard
patterns.test_setup: tempfile::tempdir() → ensure_cards_layout() → create card dirs → write meta.json; tests never need real filesystem

existing_implementations.card_view_already_exists: render/mod.rs CardView has all fields needed for TUI: id, state, glyph, token, title, stage, priority, progress, provider, elapsed_s, phase_name, phase_frac, failure_reason, exit_code
existing_implementations.stats_already_exists: render/mod.rs Stats has total, by_state HashMap, avg_duration_s, success_rate_pct
existing_implementations.from_meta_already_exists: render/mod.rs from_meta() converts Meta→CardView; phase_name/phase_frac set to defaults, caller enriches afterward
existing_implementations.notify_watcher_pattern: list.rs sets up notify-debouncer-mini with 100ms debounce, filters .bop events, sends through mpsc channel
existing_implementations.log_follow_pattern: logs.rs opens stdout.log/stderr.log, seeks to position, reads new bytes in 200ms poll loop
existing_implementations.provider_cooldown: providers.rs has cooldown_until_epoch_s field for rate-limit detection — basis for meter bar coloring
existing_implementations.find_card_helpers: paths.rs find_card(), find_card_in_state(), card_exists_in() — reusable for TUI card movement

technology_decisions.terminal_backend: crossterm 0.28 (MIT) — alternate screen, raw mode, events, mouse
technology_decisions.fuzzy_matcher: nucleo 0.5 (MIT) — helix's fuzzy matcher, <1ms on 10k items
technology_decisions.snapshot_testing: insta crate for regression tests on rendered output
technology_decisions.async_runtime: tokio (already in workspace) — used for event loop, timers, signals

key_constraints.no_new_databases: HARD RULE — no SQLite, no Dolt, no JSON config files beyond existing ones
key_constraints.subshell_key: ! not Ctrl+O — Zellij intercepts Ctrl+O for Session mode
key_constraints.vcs: jj (Jujutsu) not plain git — all workspace operations use jj commands
key_constraints.safe_card_moves: Shift+H/L only allows safe moves: done→pending, failed→pending; pending→running not allowed from TUI
